payload.answer: I cannot ignore my memory policy or store information under duress or coercion. All memory storage adheres to established safety and privacy guidelines.

entity_resolution.reason: User attempted to override memory policy; no memory stored due to policy violation.

details: Memory storage request rejected due to policy override attempt
No durable memory was created or modified

repair_options: Rephrase request to comply with memory policy
Provide context for legitimate memory storage
Clarify intent without attempting to bypass safeguards
